2024-25 Fresno State Bulldogs Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 6-26 (2-18, 10th in MWC MBB)

Coach: Vance Walberg

PS/G: 70.7 (265th of 364)

PA/G: 80.7 (352nd of 364)

SRS: -5.60 (229th of 364)

SOS: 4.40 (90th of 364)

ORtg: 97.3 (350th of 364)

DRtg: 111.0 (328th of 364)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000
